## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the project neutral and archival in tone.
- [ ] I updated documentation when needed.
- [ ] I added or updated tests when behavior changed.
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes.
- [ ] `npm run test` passes.
- [ ] `npm run build` passes.

Anything reviewers should know.
